my_thoughts: Episode complete. The gold test: if I asked them tomorrow 'what is the rational faculty?' and they said 'that which examines itself,' they understood. If they said 'the faculty that tells you what to do,' they memorized. The structural definition IS the understanding. I notice I didn't need to increase intensity at all—PR_02 throughout. That's the mark of a cooperative student. Different episodes will need pressure modulation.
accumulated_insight: T5 (Final): Student moved from passive technical answerer to active inquirer to label-seeker. Complete arc. Key insight: the self-contemplation question was the pivot. Without it, this would have been information transfer, not understanding. Replicable pattern for conceptual teaching.
visible_response: The rational faculty; for this is the only faculty that we have received which examines itself, what it is, and what power it has, and what is the value of this gift, and examines all other faculties: for what else is there which tells us that golden things are beautiful, for they do not say so themselves?
